Title: Defender Malware Alert - Trojan Activity
Remediation: Isolate device run full scan and remediate detected artifacts.

Title: Suspicious PowerShell Activity Detected
Remediation: Investigate script execution logs and block malicious commands.

Title: Ransomware Behavior Detected - File Encryption Pattern
Remediation: Isolate host disconnect from network and initiate incident response procedures.

Title: Potentially Unwanted Application Detected
Remediation: Remove unwanted software and review application whitelist policies.

Title: Unauthorized Credential Dumping Attempt
Remediation: Reset affected credentials enable MFA and investigate lateral movement.

Title: Suspicious Login Attempts from Unknown IP
Remediation: Block IP address enforce MFA and review authentication logs.

Title: Abnormal DNS Query Activity Detected
Remediation: Investigate DNS logs and block malicious domains.

Title: Active Exploit Attempt on Web Server Detected
Remediation: Isolate server apply patch and review web application firewall rules.

Title: Outdated Browser Extension Flagged
Remediation: Remove or update extension and enforce extension policy.

Title: Privilege Escalation Attempt Detected on Linux Host
Remediation: Patch kernel audit sudo logs and restrict privileged access.

Title: Unusual File Transfer Activity Detected
Remediation: Inspect file transfer logs and block unauthorized endpoints.

Title: Remote Code Execution Attempt on API Endpoint
Remediation: Patch API service enforce input validation and isolate affected service.

Title: Malicious Email Attachment Detected
Remediation: Quarantine email scan endpoint and update email security filters.

Title: Deprecated Service Running on Endpoint
Remediation: Disable service and upgrade to supported version.

Title: Unusual Authentication Failure Spike Detected
Remediation: Investigate login attempts and enforce account lockout policy.
